offer: For logistics carriers processing 50–100 shipments/month, delays in shipment tracking cause operational inefficiencies. We reconcile shipment tracking data with purchase orders instead of manual tracking and reconciliation processes.
problem: delays in shipment tracking lead to operational inefficiencies
